channel.title: Screen Capture and Dictation App Updates
channel.description: Appcast for Screen Capture and Dictation App.

item.title: Version 0.1.3
item.description:
Version 0.1.3.
- Improves capture and recording cleanup after selections complete. - Makes recording review exports safer when render options change quickly. - Preserves existing video output if a replacement export fails. - Makes dictation clipboard restoration less likely to overwrite newer clipboard changes. - Adds release and install guardrails to reduce publishing and local install mistakes.
